CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, data VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE configurations (config_name VARCHAR(255), config_value VARCHAR(255));
SELECT c.config_name, c.config_value FROM configurations c WHERE c.config_name = 'version';
WITH RECURSIVE cte AS (SELECT id, data FROM test_table WHERE id = 1 UNION ALL SELECT t.id, t.data FROM test_table t INNER JOIN cte ON t.id = cte.id + 1) SELECT * FROM cte;
SELECT a.id, a.data FROM test_table a JOIN configurations b ON a.id = LENGTH(b.config_value);
UPDATE configurations SET config_value = '1.0.1' WHERE config_name = 'version';
CREATE TABLE logs (log_id INT PRIMARY KEY, message VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO logs SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (), 'Log entry ' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER () FROM test_table;
SELECT t.id, l.message FROM test_table t LEFT JOIN logs l ON t.id = l.log_id;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temporary_table AS SELECT * FROM test_table;
SELECT * FROM temporary_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE data LIKE '%test%');
